description: Creates a perpendicular line or vector through a point in 3D space
utility: Draw a perpendicular copy of a line/vector passing through a specified point, using a reference axis

arguments.name: vector_or_line
arguments.description: The reference vector or line to make perpendicular to

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: The point the perpendicular should pass through

arguments.name: axis_vector
arguments.description: Reference axis vector to determine perpendicular direction

alternates.description: Specify the axis using x, y, z coordinates instead of vector3d
Specify the point using x, y, z coordinates

examples.expression: V = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0); A = vector3d(g, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1); perp3d(V, point3d(g, 0, 0, 0), A)
